requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Labelling — Ministry of Energy / SEC Efficiency Label for Refrigerators (etiqueta de eficiencia energetica)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——能源部/SEC电冰箱能效标签（etiqueta de eficiencia energetica）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——能源部/SEC電冰箱能效標籤（etiqueta de eficiencia energetica）

summary.en: Chile operates a mandatory energy-efficiency labelling programme for household refrigerators run by the Ministry of Energy (Ministerio de Energia) and the Agencia de Sostenibilidad Energetica, with enforcement and certification administered through SEC. Refrigerators and refrigerator-freezers must carry the Chilean energy-efficiency label (etiqueta de eficiencia energetica), which assigns an efficiency class (a graded A+ to G / A to G style scale) and reports annual electricity consumption (kWh/ano). The efficiency class is established by testing to the NCh/IEC measurement method (the IEC 62552 series as adopted by INN), and the label and product registration are managed under SEC's product-certification system tied to the local importer. The label must be displayed on the appliance at point of sale. The Ministry of Energy periodically tightens the minimum energy-performance standards (MEPS) for refrigerators.
summary.zh: 智利实行由能源部（Ministerio de Energia）及能源可持续发展局（Agencia de Sostenibilidad Energetica）运行、并通过SEC执行与认证的家用电冰箱强制能效标识计划。电冰箱及冰箱-冷冻箱组合须携带智利能效标签（etiqueta de eficiencia energetica），标注能效等级（A+至G/A至G式分级体系）并报告年耗电量（kWh/年）。能效等级通过NCh/IEC测量方法（INN采纳的IEC 62552系列）测试确定，标签及产品登记在SEC产品认证系统下与本地进口商绑定管理。标签须在销售点于器具上展示。能源部定期收紧电冰箱的最低能效标准（MEPS）。
summary.zht: 智利實行由能源部（Ministerio de Energia）及能源可持續發展局（Agencia de Sostenibilidad Energetica）運行、並通過SEC執行與認證的家用電冰箱強制能效標識計畫。電冰箱及冰箱-冷凍箱組合須攜帶智利能效標籤（etiqueta de eficiencia energetica），標注能效等級（A+至G/A至G式分級體系）並報告年耗電量（kWh/年）。能效等級通過NCh/IEC測量方法（INN採納的IEC 62552系列）測試確定，標籤及產品登記在SEC產品認證系統下與本地進口商綁定管理。標籤須在銷售點於器具上展示。能源部定期收緊電冰箱的最低能效標準（MEPS）。

standards_or_laws: Ley No 20.402 / Ley No 21.305 (energy efficiency framework) — Ministry of Energy energy-efficiency policy and labelling mandate
Ministry of Energy / SEC energy-efficiency labelling programme for refrigerators (etiqueta de eficiencia energetica) — mandatory efficiency class and kWh/ano declaration
NCh / IEC 62552 series — household refrigerating appliances characteristics and test methods (INN adoption; basis for the Chilean efficiency-class measurement)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy-efficiency grades for household refrigerators), establishing a 1-to-5 grade scale (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits. It is mandatory (GB), enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label (CEL) administered under the NDRC/SAMR Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels; products must display the China Energy Label before sale. The Chinese 1-to-5 grade and the Chilean A-to-G efficiency class use different scales and calculation bases and are not directly cross-comparable without recalculation to the Chilean method.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，中国能效标识（CEL）依据NDRC/SAMR《能源效率标识管理办法》管理；产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识。中国1至5级与智利A至G能效等级采用不同的分级和计算基准，未经按智利方法重新计算不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，中國能效標識（CEL）依據NDRC/SAMR《能源效率標識管理辦法》管理；產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識。中國1至5級與智利A至G能效等級採用不同的分級和計算基準，未經按智利方法重新計算不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework

gap.en: The efficiency-labelling obligation exists in both markets but is not transferable: (1) Different class scale and calculation — Chile's efficiency class (A-to-G style) is derived through the IEC 62552-series method as adopted by INN, whereas China's GB 12021.2 uses a 1-to-5 grade with a different reference-consumption basis; a Chinese Grade 1 rating does not automatically map to a Chilean top class and must be recalculated; (2) Distinct physical label — the Chilean etiqueta de eficiencia energetica (Spanish-language, Chile-specific format) must be applied; the China Energy Label cannot serve as the Chilean label; (3) Product registration — the model's efficiency data must be registered and the label approved within the SEC / Ministry of Energy programme through the local importer before sale; (4) MEPS check — the appliance must meet Chile's current minimum energy-performance standard, which the Ministry of Energy revises over time, so a model compliant with an earlier threshold or only with Chinese grades may need verification against the current Chilean MEPS.
gap.zh: 两个市场都存在能效标识义务，但不可互转：（1）等级分级和计算不同——智利能效等级（A至G式）通过INN采纳的IEC 62552系列方法得出，而中国GB 12021.2采用1至5级及不同的参考耗电量基准；中国1级评定不自动对应智利最高等级，须重新计算；（2）实体标签不同——须使用智利能效标签（西班牙语、智利专属格式）；中国能效标识不能充当智利标签；（3）产品登记——型号能效数据须在SEC/能源部计划内通过本地进口商登记并审批标签后方可销售；（4）MEPS核查——器具须满足智利现行最低能效标准，能源部会随时间修订该标准，因此仅符合早期门槛或仅符合中国等级的型号可能需要针对智利现行MEPS核实。
gap.zht: 兩個市場都存在能效標識義務，但不可互轉：（1）等級分級和計算不同——智利能效等級（A至G式）通過INN採納的IEC 62552系列方法得出，而中國GB 12021.2採用1至5級及不同的參考耗電量基準；中國1級評定不自動對應智利最高等級，須重新計算；（2）實體標籤不同——須使用智利能效標籤（西班牙語、智利專屬格式）；中國能效標識不能充當智利標籤；（3）產品登記——型號能效數據須在SEC/能源部計畫內通過本地進口商登記並審批標籤後方可銷售；（4）MEPS核查——器具須滿足智利現行最低能效標準，能源部會隨時間修訂該標準，因此僅符合早期門檻或僅符合中國等級的型號可能需要針對智利現行MEPS核實。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Chilean energy-efficiency label (etiqueta de eficiencia energetica) and product registration through the SEC / Ministry of Energy programme required before sale; appliance must meet the current Chilean MEPS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 energy-efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC) / Ministerio de Energia, Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chilean energy-efficiency label and product registration through the SEC / Ministry of Energy programme are mandatory before a refrigerator is sold in Chile. China's GB 12021.2 grade does not substitute — efficiency must be recalculated to the Chilean class (IEC 62552 basis), the Chilean Spanish-language label applied, and the model registered via the local importer. Verify the appliance against Chile's current MEPS.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在智利销售电冰箱前，须取得智利能效标签并通过SEC/能源部计划完成产品登记。中国GB 12021.2等级不能替代——须按智利等级（IEC 62552基准）重新计算能效，贴附智利西班牙语标签，并通过本地进口商登记型号。须针对智利现行MEPS核实器具。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在智利銷售電冰箱前，須取得智利能效標籤並通過SEC/能源部計畫完成產品登記。中國GB 12021.2等級不能替代——須按智利等級（IEC 62552基準）重新計算能效，貼附智利西班牙語標籤，並通過本地進口商登記型號。須針對智利現行MEPS核實器具。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Performance Testing & MEPS — Test Method Alignment (NCh/IEC 62552 vs GB measurement)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效性能测试与MEPS——测试方法对齐（NCh/IEC 62552 与 GB 测量）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效性能測試與MEPS——測試方法對齊（NCh/IEC 62552 與 GB 測量）

summary.en: The efficiency class and annual-consumption figure printed on the Chilean label must be substantiated by testing to the measurement method adopted by INN — the IEC 62552 series (Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods). Chile, through the Ministry of Energy and SEC, sets minimum energy-performance standards (MEPS) that a refrigerator must meet to be sold; test reports must be produced by a laboratory accepted under the SEC certification scheme and submitted by the importer as part of efficiency-label registration. Because Chile's grid is 220 V, 50 Hz (the same 50 Hz as China), the test conditions for energy measurement are closer to Chinese conditions than for a 60 Hz market, but the IEC 62552 ambient-temperature and load-configuration protocol and the Chilean reference-consumption formula must be applied to derive the Chilean class.
summary.zh: 智利标签上印制的能效等级及年耗电量数值，须以INN采纳的测量方法——IEC 62552系列（家用制冷器具——特性和试验方法）的测试为依据。智利通过能源部和SEC设定电冰箱销售须达到的最低能效标准（MEPS）；检测报告须由SEC认证方案接受的实验室出具，并由进口商作为能效标签登记的一部分提交。由于智利电网为220 V、50 Hz（与中国同为50 Hz），能效测量的试验条件比60 Hz市场更接近中国条件，但仍须采用IEC 62552的环境温度和负载配置规程以及智利参考耗电量公式来得出智利等级。
summary.zht: 智利標籤上印製的能效等級及年耗電量數值，須以INN採納的測量方法——IEC 62552系列（家用製冷器具——特性和試驗方法）的測試為依據。智利通過能源部和SEC設定電冰箱銷售須達到的最低能效標準（MEPS）；檢測報告須由SEC認證方案接受的實驗室出具，並由進口商作為能效標籤登記的一部分提交。由於智利電網為220 V、50 Hz（與中國同為50 Hz），能效測量的試驗條件比60 Hz市場更接近中國條件，但仍須採用IEC 62552的環境溫度和負載配置規程以及智利參考耗電量公式來得出智利等級。

standards_or_laws: NCh / IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (INN adoption; energy-measurement basis for the Chilean efficiency class)
Ministry of Energy minimum energy-performance standards (MEPS) for refrigerators — periodically revised threshold for market access
SEC certification scheme — accepted-laboratory test reports required for efficiency-label registration via the importer

summary.en: China measures refrigerator energy performance under GB/T 8059 (Household and similar refrigerating appliances — test methods, aligned with the IEC 62552 series) and assigns grades under GB 12021.2. Although both China and Chile ultimately reference the IEC 62552 measurement family, the Chinese grade boundaries, reference-consumption formula, and labelled annual-consumption figure are defined by the Chinese standards and the China Energy Label, not by the Chilean MEPS or class boundaries. Chinese test reports are produced by CNAS-accredited laboratories for the CEL system and are not automatically accepted by the Chilean SEC / Ministry of Energy efficiency programme.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB/T 8059（家用和类似制冷器具——试验方法，与IEC 62552系列对齐）测量电冰箱能效，并依据GB 12021.2评定等级。尽管中智两国最终都参照IEC 62552测量体系，但中国的等级边界、参考耗电量公式及标注的年耗电量数值由中国标准和中国能效标识确定，而非智利MEPS或等级边界。中国检测报告由CNAS认可实验室为CEL体系出具，不被智利SEC/能源部能效计划自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB/T 8059（家用和類似製冷器具——試驗方法，與IEC 62552系列對齊）測量電冰箱能效，並依據GB 12021.2評定等級。儘管中智兩國最終都參照IEC 62552測量體系，但中國的等級邊界、參考耗電量公式及標注的年耗電量數值由中國標準和中國能效標識確定，而非智利MEPS或等級邊界。中國檢測報告由CNAS認可實驗室為CEL體系出具，不被智利SEC/能源部能效計畫自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)
GB 12021.2-2015 — energy-efficiency grades and minimum allowable values (grade-boundary basis for the China Energy Label)

gap.en: Because both China (GB/T 8059) and Chile (NCh/IEC 62552) trace to the IEC 62552 family, the raw test data is largely re-usable, narrowing this to a recalculation and acceptance gap rather than a re-test-from-scratch gap: (1) the Chilean efficiency class and the kWh/ano figure must be recomputed using Chile's reference formula and class boundaries — a Chinese Grade 1/Grade 2 does not directly yield the Chilean class; (2) the test report must come from, or be accepted by, a laboratory recognised in the SEC certification scheme — a CNAS-only report may need an accepted laboratory's review or a CB/ILAC-MRA pathway; (3) the model must clear Chile's current MEPS threshold; (4) the 50 Hz / 220 V condition is favourable (no 60 Hz re-test of compressor energy behaviour), but the exact ambient/load configuration and the latest IEC 62552 edition referenced by INN should be confirmed. [NOTE: confirm the current Chilean refrigerator MEPS threshold and the exact NCh/IEC 62552 edition with SEC / Ministry of Energy before registration.]
gap.zh: 由于中国（GB/T 8059）与智利（NCh/IEC 62552）均溯源至IEC 62552体系，原始检测数据大体可复用，使本项缩窄为重新计算与认可差距，而非从头重测差距：（1）智利能效等级及kWh/年数值须用智利参考公式和等级边界重新计算——中国1级/2级不直接得出智利等级；（2）检测报告须来自或被SEC认证方案认可的实验室——仅有CNAS的报告可能需要被认可实验室复核或走CB/ILAC-MRA路径；（3）型号须通过智利现行MEPS门槛；（4）50 Hz/220 V条件有利（无需对压缩机能效行为进行60 Hz重测），但应确认确切的环境/负载配置及INN参照的最新IEC 62552版本。【注：登记前向SEC/能源部确认智利电冰箱现行MEPS门槛及确切的NCh/IEC 62552版本。】
gap.zht: 由於中國（GB/T 8059）與智利（NCh/IEC 62552）均溯源至IEC 62552體系，原始檢測數據大體可複用，使本項縮窄為重新計算與認可差距，而非從頭重測差距：（1）智利能效等級及kWh/年數值須用智利參考公式和等級邊界重新計算——中國1級/2級不直接得出智利等級；（2）檢測報告須來自或被SEC認證方案認可的實驗室——僅有CNAS的報告可能需要被認可實驗室複核或走CB/ILAC-MRA路徑；（3）型號須通過智利現行MEPS門檻；（4）50 Hz/220 V條件有利（無需對壓縮機能效行為進行60 Hz重測），但應確認確切的環境/負載配置及INN參照的最新IEC 62552版本。【注：登記前向SEC/能源部確認智利電冰箱現行MEPS門檻及確切的NCh/IEC 62552版本。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — energy-performance testing to NCh/IEC 62552 and meeting the current Ministry of Energy MEPS are required for efficiency-label registration before sale in Chile
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 8059 test method and GB 12021.2 grade compliance underpin the China Energy Label required before sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chilean energy-label registration requires testing to NCh/IEC 62552 and clearing the current Ministry of Energy MEPS. Because both China and Chile reference the IEC 62552 test family, Chinese GB/T 8059 data is largely re-usable, but the Chilean efficiency class and kWh/ano must be recalculated to Chile's formula and the report routed through an SEC-accepted laboratory. The shared 50 Hz / 220 V grid avoids a 60 Hz re-test.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智利能效标签登记须按NCh/IEC 62552测试并通过能源部现行MEPS。由于中智两国均参照IEC 62552测试体系，中国GB/T 8059数据大体可复用，但智利能效等级及kWh/年须按智利公式重新计算，且报告须经SEC认可实验室出具。共用的50 Hz/220 V电网可避免60 Hz重测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智利能效標籤登記須按NCh/IEC 62552測試並通過能源部現行MEPS。由於中智兩國均參照IEC 62552測試體系，中國GB/T 8059數據大體可複用，但智利能效等級及kWh/年須按智利公式重新計算，且報告須經SEC認可實驗室出具。共用的50 Hz/220 V電網可避免60 Hz重測。
